plant.description: Known as the 'Giant Milkweed', holy to Lord Shiva.

method_1.method: External application of latex or internal use of flowers.

medicinal_uses: Latex used for localized skin tumors and warts.
Leaves used to treat orthopedic pain.
Flowers used for chronic cough and asthma.

safety_profile.warning: LATEX IS TOXIC TO EYES. Internal use must be very small and expert-led.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.

plant_profile.note: AI estimated profile based on known properties
